name: part_003
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: 3D live concert performance. FUWAMOCO and Mori Calliope are singing and dancing.
MC section after the song. The performers talk to the audience and FUWAMOCO introduces the next song.
FUWAMOCO performs the song 'Jo t'aime ★ Jo t'aime'.
